occurrence_sentence: PRESS RELEASE — [QAI Ventures](https://qai-ventures.com), an ecosystem builder born out of the privately funded initiative of [uptownBasel](https://uptownbasel.ch/), is expanding its presence to Calgary, Alberta, Canada, and plans a close collaboration with Quantum City.

occurrence_sentence: PRESS RELEASE — [QAI Ventures](https://qai-ventures.com), an ecosystem builder born out of the privately funded initiative of [uptownBasel](https://uptownbasel.ch/), is expanding its presence to Calgary, Alberta, Canada, and plans a close collaboration with Quantum City.

interaction_phrase: QAI Ventures and Quantum City intend to launch a project to lay
occurrence_sentence: To initiate this collaboration, QAI Ventures and Quantum City intend to launch a project to lay the foundation for quantum science and technology advancements, which will allow startups to utilize the advantages of the two industry locations, Arlesheim, Switzerland, and Alberta, Canada, and develop their technologies in the best possible way alongside an investment instrument.
